sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET Stake Raised by Argus Investors Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: Argus Investors Counsel Inc. significantly increased its stake in Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) by 188.7% in Q3, making it a prominent holding in their portfolio. This occurred despite recent notable insider selling by executives. Arista Networks reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing revenue and EPS estimates, contributing to analysts' "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $164.44.

feed.title: International Business Machines Corporation $IBM Shares Sold by Ashton Thomas Securities LLC
feed.summary: Ashton Thomas Securities LLC reduced its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 42.4% in the third quarter, selling 1,935 shares and retaining 2,626 shares valued at $741,000. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $303.38. IBM outperformed Q3 estimates, reporting $2.65 EPS against an expected $2.45 and revenue of $16.33 billion, a 9.1% year-over-year increase, while also maintaining a quarterly dividend of $1.68 per share.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Expected to Report $11.65 EPS on $13.79 Billion Revenue
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs is projected to report earnings of $11.65 per share and $13.79 billion in revenue, despite a slight dip in its stock price in after-hours trading. The article also covers other market news, including Mission Produce's acquisition of Calavo Growers, Morgan Stanley's earnings expectations, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd.'s profit surge. Analyst ratings for BlackRock (BLK) are also presented, with several firms adjusting their price targets and ratings.

feed.title: FedEx Expands Zero-Emission Fleet in Japan with 17 Electric Trucks to Support 2040 Carbon Neutral Goal
feed.summary: FedEx has expanded its Japan fleet by adding 17 electric trucks, including Mitsubishi Fuso eCanter and Isuzu ELF EVs, to advance its 2040 carbon neutrality goal. These vehicles are expected to significantly reduce tailpipe emissions in urban areas like Tokyo, Kanagawa, and Osaka. This initiative also aligns with Japan's target of a 60% reduction in greenhouse gases by 2035 and net-zero emissions by 2050, reinforcing FedEx's commitment to environmental sustainability.

feed.title: Ecolab Inc.: How a Quiet Chemistry Powerhouse Became a Critical Climate and Hygiene Platform
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc. has established itself as a critical platform in water management, hygiene, and infection prevention, leveraging proprietary chemistry, digital tools, and on-site services. The company's integrated approach, embedded field force, and focus on measurable outcomes give it a competitive edge against specialized rivals. This robust model contributes to its significant valuation and resilience in the stock market, reflecting investor confidence in its role in global sustainability and safety trends.

feed.title: Lincoln Electric (LECO) Price Targets Lowered at Morgan Stanley and Stifel Ahead of 2026 Reset
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley and Stifel have lowered their price targets for Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (LECO) ahead of 2026. Morgan Stanley analyst Angel Castillo trimmed the target to $208 from $209, maintaining an Underweight rating, following routine model changes. Stifel analyst Nathan Jones reduced the target to $252 from $265, keeping a Hold rating, citing 2025 growth driven by tariff-related price increases and expecting improved volume growth in 2026 as inventory destocking fades.

feed.title: New sterilization cycle targets duodenoscope contamination in Europe
feed.summary: Advanced Sterilization Products (ASP) has received CE mark approval for its ULTRA GI Cycle for STERRAD™ 100NX Sterilizer, developed in partnership with FUJIFILM Healthcare Europe. This new cycle introduces a validated hydrogen peroxide gas plasma sterilization method for complex endoscopes, specifically targeting duodenoscope contamination to enhance patient safety in Europe. The collaboration aims to address infection control challenges associated with duodenoscopes by providing an advanced sterilization solution.

feed.title: Horizon Aircraft targets first flight of Cavorite X7 hybrid-electric eVTOL in early 2027
feed.summary: Horizon Aircraft plans for the first flight of its Cavorite X7 hybrid-electric eVTOL aircraft in early 2027, with full-scale prototype assembly scheduled for 2026. The Canadian company reported significant development progress, strengthened liquidity with over $24 million in cash, and a focus on R&D, supported by a $10.5 million grant. Horizon Aircraft is also expanding its engineering team and supply chain in support of the X7 program, which targets regional operators, emergency services, and military users.

feed.title: Enphase begins shipping GaN-based commercial microinverters
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has started commercial shipments of its IQ9N-3P microinverter, which uses gallium nitride technology for the 480 V three-phase market. This microinverter offers 427 VA peak power and 97.5% efficiency, supporting solar panels up to 600 watts for various commercial rooftop applications. Manufactured in the U.S., it aims to meet domestic content requirements and provide a reliable, flexible solution for commercial solar projects.

feed.title: TrueShares Structured Outcome (February) ETF (BATS:FEBZ) Shares Down 0.8% – Here’s What Happened
feed.summary: Shares of TrueShares Structured Outcome (February) ETF (FEBZ) declined by 0.8% on Wednesday, with approximately 463 shares traded. The ETF, which aims for buffered losses on the S&P 500 with uncapped gains, recently declared an annual dividend of $1.2042 per share. FEBZ has a market cap of $9.87 million and a dividend yield of 317.0%.

feed.title: The Truth About Allstate Corp.: Is This Boring Insurance Stock Secretly a Power Play?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Allstate Corp. (ALL), an insurance stock often overlooked but showing potential as a stable investment. It delves into Allstate's business model, price performance, and risks, comparing it to competitors like Progressive, and discusses whether it's a "cop" or "drop" for different types of investors. The article concludes that while not a high-growth "meme stock," Allstate could be a valuable, dividend-paying anchor for long-term or risk-balancing portfolios.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
feed.summary: This article highlights key stocks to watch on Thursday morning, including Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Calavo Growers, Taiwan Semiconductor, and BlackRock. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are set to release their quarterly earnings, while Calavo Growers announced downbeat Q4 results but received an acquisition offer. Taiwan Semiconductor is noted for a significant profit surge, and BlackRock will also report its earnings.

feed.title: What GSI Technology (GSIT)'s Government-Funded Sentinel AI Defense Trial Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: GSI Technology (GSIT) has announced a government-funded proof-of-concept trial for its Gemini-II compute-in-memory APU with Israel's G2 Tech and the U.S. Department of War, integrating it into the Sentinel autonomous security system. This US$1 million project validates Gemini-II's use in mission-critical defense applications, reinforcing GSI's edge AI narrative, though the company remains small and unprofitable with a volatile share price. The initiative represents a positive step for Gemini-II's external validation and near-term revenue but does not guarantee long-term commercial success or profitability, requiring investors to consider various perspectives on its valuation.

feed.title: McKesson (MCK) Valuation Check As Rapiblyk Distribution Expands In US Critical Cardiac Care
feed.summary: McKesson (MCK) is expanding its distribution of Rapiblyk for critical cardiac care, influencing its stock valuation. Despite strong past performance and being firm at $834.16, McKesson is considered 11.2% undervalued with a narrative fair value of $939.33 due to growing specialty pharmaceutical adoption and efficiency investments. However, its current P/E ratio is higher than the industry average, suggesting the market is partially pricing in future growth.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher partners with NVIDIA leveraging AI to advance scientific instrumentation
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has announced a strategic collaboration with NVIDIA to integrate AI-based solutions and laboratory automation. This partnership aims to enhance the automation, accuracy, and speed of laboratories by combining Thermo Fisher's expertise in scientific instruments with NVIDIA's AI platform, including NVIDIA DGX Spark and models like NVIDIA NeMo and BioNeMo. The goal is to evolve scientific instrumentation to interact seamlessly with scientists, reduce manual steps, and accelerate scientific discovery.

feed.title: Google Executive Warns US Power Grid Isn't Keeping Up With AI Data Center Expansion, Describes 'Number One Challenge' On The Network
feed.summary: A Google executive has raised concerns that the U.S. power grid is struggling to keep pace with the rapid expansion of AI data centers, citing transmission bottlenecks that can cause years-long delays for grid connections. Google is exploring temporary solutions like colocation, placing data centers next to power plants, while striving for eventual grid integration. The growing energy demand from AI is projected to significantly increase global electricity consumption by 2035.

feed.title: Dover Sues Insulin Makers and PBMs, Alleges RICO Scheme Driving Up Drug Prices
feed.summary: Dover Corp. has filed a federal lawsuit accusing major insulin manufacturers (Eli Lilly, Novo Nordisk, Sanofi) and pharmacy benefit managers (including CVS Health Corp.) of an illegal pricing scheme that inflated insulin costs for over two decades. The lawsuit alleges a Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations (RICO) scheme where manufacturers raised list prices and funneled payments to PBMs for preferential formulary placement, leading to millions in excess costs for health-plan sponsors like Dover. While defendants deny the claims, similar lawsuits have emerged, though some prior RICO allegations in other cases have faced dismissals.

feed.title: Rep. Julia Letlow Sells Off Shares of AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV)
feed.summary: Representative Julia Letlow (R-Louisiana) recently sold between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of AbbVie (ABBV) stock on December 8th, as disclosed in a January 13th filing. This sale was part of several transactions in December 2025 by Letlow, including other sales and purchases of various company stocks. AbbVie recently reported strong quarterly earnings, raised its dividend, and is involved in strategic moves to expand into the obesity treatment market and secure licensing partnerships.

feed.title: Rep. Julia Letlow Purchases Shares of The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS)
feed.summary: Representative Julia Letlow (R-Louisiana) recently disclosed a purchase of between $1,001 and $15,000 in Walt Disney (NYSE: DIS) stock on November 3rd, made through her Merrill Lynch account. This transaction is part of several buys and sells of different stocks she made in December 2025 and earlier. The article details Disney's recent financial performance, including beating EPS estimates, and highlights analyst ratings, stock performance, and hedge fund activities related to DIS.

feed.title: TJX Companies Plans 35% Store Expansion Over 15 Years
feed.summary: TJX Companies plans a significant expansion, aiming to increase its store count by 35% to 7,000 locations over the next 10 to 15 years, with a notable doubling of HomeGoods stores in the U.S. This aggressive growth strategy follows strong Q3 comparable store sales, exceeding analyst expectations, and demonstrates effective cost management leading to margin expansion. Analysts largely maintain positive outlooks for TJX, citing strong consumer trends and a promising macro environment for retail.

feed.title: PTC Therapeutics to Present at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. announced that its CEO, Matthew B. Klein, M.D., will present at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 12, 2026, at 9 a.m. PST/12 p.m. EST. The presentation will be webcast live and archived on the Investors section of the company's website. PTC Therapeutics is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing medicines for rare disorders.

feed.title: TJX Companies: The Retail Stock That Actually Benefits From Tariffs and Inflation
feed.summary: TJX Companies excels due to its off-price retail model, which thrives when traditional retailers struggle, benefiting from increased transaction volumes and basket sizes. Despite a premium valuation reflecting high expectations and past strong performance, the company has significant long-term growth potential by expanding its store base, especially its HomeGoods chain. While its model offers resilience during economic downturns, potential risks include its high valuation and the challenges of execution for aggressive expansion plans.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper launches cash offer for JDE Peet’s shares
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. has initiated a recommended public cash offer to acquire all outstanding ordinary shares of JDE Peet’s N.V. The offer, made through Kodiak BidCo B.V., is priced at EUR 31.85 per share in cash. This strategic move aims to combine Keurig Dr Pepper's strong beverage portfolio with JDE Peet's established coffee and tea brands.

feed.title: Amcor stock reaches all-time high at 44.1 USD
feed.summary: Amcor's stock has hit an all-time high of $44.10, despite a -2.84% 1-year price return, showing a 5.76% year-to-date gain and trading near its 52-week high of $52.25. The company maintains an attractive P/E ratio of 5.46, has raised its dividend for seven consecutive years, and reported strong Q1 fiscal year 2026 earnings, leading to an upgraded rating from Baird. However, Morgan Stanley adjusted its price target downward due to a mixed forecast.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from nineteen brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $286.50. The company's stock has seen recent upgrades from Wells Fargo and Goldman Sachs, and it beat Q3 EPS estimates while setting positive FY2025 guidance. Institutional investors have significantly increased their stakes in HLT, with 95.90% of the stock owned by this group.

feed.title: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with a consensus 12-month target price of $127.29. The company recently reported Q3 earnings, missing estimates slightly, but has set FY 2025 EPS guidance. Insider Benjamin Fowke III sold a portion of his shares, while institutional investors show significant holdings.

feed.title: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) Receives Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from thirteen analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $86.00. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance. Sysco also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.54, resulting in a 2.8% yield, and institutional investors hold a significant majority of its stock.

feed.title: Badawi Explores Lithium Extraction with SLB at Riyadh Forum
feed.summary: SLB has expressed interest in assessing lithium potential and extraction in Egypt, planning pilot tests in the Eastern Desert. This development occurred during a meeting between SLB's Head of Mining, Nicholas Lugansky, and Egypt's Minister of Petroleum and Mineral Resources, Karim Badawi, at the Future Minerals Forum in Saudi Arabia. Badawi also held discussions with representatives from Curtin University and the Colorado School of Mines to enhance Egyptian human capital in the mining sector, building on previous agreements.

feed.title: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) has received a "Buy" consensus recommendation from twelve analysts, with an average one-year price target of $41.20. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing an 8.4% revenue increase year-over-year, alongside setting FY2025 EPS guidance. PPL also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2725 per share, representing a 3.1% dividend yield.

feed.title: Two new KDP companies after EUR 31.85 JDE offer, coffee in 100+ countries
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has launched a public cash offer to acquire all shares of JDE Peet's (JDEP) for EUR 31.85 per share, with JDE Peet's also paying an additional EUR 0.36 dividend. Following the acquisition, KDP plans to separate into two independent U.S.-listed companies: a North American refreshment beverages company and a global coffee leader serving over 100 countries. The offer period runs from January 16 to March 27, 2026, and is subject to a minimum acceptance threshold of 95%, which can be lowered to 80% if shareholders approve post-closing restructuring measures.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company: Steady Dividend Giant Faces Valuation Crossroads as Wall Street Turns Cautious
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (GPC) is navigating a complex market, with its stock showing modest short-term gains but underperforming over the last year. While the company offers attractive dividends and resilient cash flows, analysts are cautious due to slower growth expectations and a valuation that reflects quality but limits upside. The market views GPC as a dependable, income-oriented holding rather than a growth vehicle, leading to a "Hold" consensus from Wall Street until clearer growth catalysts emerge or the valuation becomes more attractive.

feed.title: Ioneer and Cat dealer announce services partnership for Rhyolite Ridge lithium-boron project
feed.summary: Ioneer Ltd and Empire Southwest, a Caterpillar dealer, have formed a Master Service Agreement to support the development and operation of the Rhyolite Ridge lithium-boron project in Nevada, USA. This partnership will provide sales, services, technology, and equipment rental, aiming to leverage Cat's automated haul trucks for mining operations. The Rhyolite Ridge project is set to begin construction in 2026, with commercial operations planned for 2029, and is anticipated to be a significant producer of critical minerals.

feed.title: Customers Bancorp (CUBI) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Customers Bancorp (CUBI) is slated to release its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Thursday, January 22nd, with analysts projecting $2.03 EPS and $200.38 million in revenue. The bank surpassed estimates in the previous quarter with $2.20 EPS and $231.77 million in revenue. Despite recent insider selling, the consensus analyst rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $84.80.

feed.title: Today's flows: 01/15 Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group saw an inflow of JPY¥ 9.48 billion, Toyota Industries saw an outflow of JPY¥ 17.06 billion
feed.summary: On January 15th, the TSE Main Market experienced balanced inflows and outflows of JPY¥ 1.19 trillion. Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Ryohin Keikaku, and Daiichi Sankyo were net buyers, with Mitsubishi UFJ seeing the largest inflow of JPY¥ 9.48 billion. Conversely, Toyota Industries, SoftBank Group, and Advantest were net sellers, with Toyota Industries experiencing the largest outflow of JPY¥ 17.06 billion.

feed.title: EZU ETF: Attractive Valuation Given Its Growth Prospect (BATS:EZU)
feed.summary: The iShares MSCI Eurozone ETF (EZU) offers a diversified portfolio of Eurozone large and mid-cap stocks with an expense ratio of 0.51%. Although it has underperformed the S&P 500 due to lower technology exposure, EZU shows stable performance and balanced sector allocation. With expected earnings growth acceleration in 2025-2026 and an attractive forward P/E of 12.8x, EZU is positioned as a good candidate for portfolio diversification, supported by improving economic conditions in the Euro area.

feed.title: First Mid Bancshares (FMBH) to Release Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: First Mid Bancshares (FMBH) is set to release its quarterly earnings before market open on Thursday, January 22nd. Analysts forecast earnings of $1.06 per share and $67.858 million in revenue. The article also provides recent stock performance, dividend information, changes in analyst ratings, and details on insider and institutional investor transactions.

feed.title: JHX Investors Have Opportunity to Join James Hardie Industries plc Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is investigating potential securities law violations related to James Hardie Industries plc (JHX). This investigation follows James Hardie's acquisition of The AZEK Company and a subsequent significant sales decline reported in its North America Fiber Cement business, which led to a drop in the company's share price. The firm is looking into whether James Hardie made misleading statements regarding its business strength before the merger with AZEK.

feed.title: McDonald’s Franchise Owner Responds to Widower’s Wrongful Death Suit
feed.summary: A McDonald's franchise owner in Boyle Heights has responded to a wrongful death lawsuit filed by a widower whose wife was allegedly killed by a vagrant at their drive-through in 2024. The lawsuit claims negligence, stating that the restaurant ignored safety concerns despite a history of incidents and staff observing the vagrant's actions. The owner expressed sympathy but contests the claims, vowing to respond through legal channels.

feed.title: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 42 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $215.97. Despite a recent critical "BodySnatcher" AI-agent vulnerability that led to a 52-week low and some analyst target cuts, the overall sentiment remains positive, with 32 buy and 3 strong buy recommendations. Insider sales totaled $2.53 million in the last 90 days, while institutional investors hold a significant 87.18% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) has received an average rating of "Moderate Buy" from 37 analysts, with a consensus one-year price target of $284.07. Recent developments include a partnership with Google's Gemini for Siri and the launch of Creator Studio, which are expected to boost Services monetization and device refresh cycles. Despite some near-term risks like chipboard material shortages and advocacy pressure, Apple recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and maintains a market capitalization of almost $3.8 trillion.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from twenty-four brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $485.95. This follows strong quarterly earnings where HCA beat analyst expectations with $6.96 EPS and $19.16 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic FY2025 guidance. The company also announced a quarterly dividend, and its stock has a market capitalization of $109.07 billion.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from 52 analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $326.31, driven by AI momentum and strategic wins like Apple choosing Gemini for Siri. Despite recent significant insider selling totaling approximately $57.7 million, Alphabet's stock has surpassed a $4 trillion market capitalization and recently beat quarterly EPS and revenue estimates. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.21 per share.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: GE Aerospace (GE) is scheduled to announce its Q4 2025 earnings before the market opens on Thursday, January 22nd, with analysts expecting $1.40 EPS and $11.273 billion in revenue. The company previously reported strong Q3 2025 results, exceeding analyst estimates, and has provided FY 2025 EPS guidance of $6.00-$6.20. Key positive developments include significant new engine orders from Delta and a large U.S. Navy contract, alongside a consistent quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider S&P Global (SPGI) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains
feed.summary: S&P Global (SPGI) has seen strong share price gains over the last several years, with its stock closing at US$545.00. However, Simply Wall St's valuation analysis suggests the company may be overvalued, with the Excess Returns model indicating a 61.0% overvaluation and the P/E ratio being higher than industry and peer averages. The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" to form their own valuation based on their assumptions about the company's future performance.

feed.title: Is Kraft Heinz (KHC) Pricing Reflecting Its Recent Slide Or Future Cash Flow Potential
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) stock is currently trading at US$24.32, experiencing an 11.0% decline over the last year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 64.6%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $68.79 per share. Additionally, its Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratio of 1.14x indicates undervaluation compared to Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 1.34x.

feed.title: |Invivyd (IVVD) Reports Strong Q4 Growth, Advances COVID Antibody to Phase 3
feed.summary: |Invivyd, Inc. (IVVD) reported strong preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 net product revenue of $17.2 million for PEMGARDA, marking significant growth. The company ended 2025 with $226.7 million in cash and equivalents and has launched its DECLARATION Phase 3 pivotal trial for VYD2311, a COVID-19 antibody alternative, expecting top-line results by mid-2026. Invivyd is also advancing its pipeline with an RSV antibody candidate and a measles antibody program, with sufficient cash resources to fund milestones through 2026.

feed.title: Hub Security announces 1-for-15 reverse share split effective Jan 16
feed.summary: Hub Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ:HUBC) has announced a 1-for-15 reverse share split of its ordinary shares, effective January 15, 2026, with split-adjusted trading beginning January 16, 2026. This move aims to increase the per-share trading price to maintain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. The company's recent financial report showed revenues of $15.1 million for the first half of 2025 and a net loss of $41.8 million, alongside securing a $5 million contract from the Israeli Ministry of Interior.

feed.title: Middlefield Banc (MBCN) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Middlefield Banc (NASDAQ:MBCN) is set to announce its Q4 2025 earnings before market open on Thursday, January 22nd. Analysts forecast an EPS of $0.65 and revenue of approximately $19.97 million. The company previously beat estimates with $0.65 EPS and mainains a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $30.00.

feed.title: GSI Technology partners with G2 Tech on security system for government agencies
feed.summary: GSI Technology has announced a new proof-of-concept engagement with the U.S. Department of War and a foreign government agency to develop an autonomous perimeter security system called Sentinel. Partnering with G2 Tech, the system will manage drones and cameras for real-time monitoring, detection, and response, leveraging GSI's Associative Processing Unit (APU) for on-device AI inference. The governmental funding for this project is in the millions, with GSI expected to receive approximately $1 million.

feed.title: FRMI Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Fermi Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) for alleged violations of federal securities laws. Investors who purchased Fermi securities during the IPO period and/or between October 1, 2025, and December 11, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before March 6, 2026. The lawsuit claims Fermi made false and misleading statements regarding tenant demand for its Project Matador campus and its reliance on a single tenant's funding commitment.
